title: RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: GOVERNMENT OFFICE RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent assistance. Assistance is based on available funding and is not guaranteed. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be enrolled in a federally recognized tribe and low-income Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-9577 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Application (541) 888-9577 Beth Hager [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the waitlist application. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Rental Assistance: State of Oregon Student Rental Assistance: Nationwide Services: Rent Payment Assistance * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT LOAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE/HOMELESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME REPAIR PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - TRIBAL HOUSING INFORMATION SERVICES - TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIRCLES OF HEALING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
